description: Phase-0 cleanup: (1) a rejected fight action now carries its real reason in result.error instead of being dropped so the UI shows the generic 'Unknown error'. Selecting a fighter while the global Pile In step (12.02) is still active is refused, and result.error is the human-readable 12.04/12.02 reason. (2) The per-unit 10e 'MOVEMENT ACTIONS: Pile In / Consolidate' buttons were removed from the fight right panel (pile-in/consolidate are global 11e steps) — the screenshot shows the right panel with no such buttons.

steps.equals: The Pile In step (12.02) must finish before units are selected to fight
